description: Mobile-first maze-chase arcade game. Player navigates a tile-grid maze, eats all dots while avoiding roaming enemies, and grabs power pellets that temporarily reverse the chase. Mobile-friendly with touch swipe + keyboard arrows, canvas-rendered maze with grid-snap movement, RAF game loop, localStorage high score and lives.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated tile-grid maze with per-enemy AI behaviors and power-pellet state machine. Mobile portrait layout with on-screen swipe controls. Preserve the maze grid + tile-snap movement model when modifying. Use a generic protagonist (e.g., colored circle hero) and abstract enemy shapes; avoid recreating recognizable arcade-character art.
